_meta.doc: Catalog of species (sessile + motile) for bug-simulator. Empty in v0.1.0; first entries land with the rotting-log scenario.

schema_fields.motile: boolean — false for sessile organisms (fungi/moss/lichen/algae/sessile-larvae), true for motile bugs
schema_fields.guild: string — sessile_decomposer | sessile_autotroph | detritivore | fungivore | predator | parasitoid | herbivore | pollinator
schema_fields.growth_form: string — for sessile: crustose | foliose | fruticose | mycelial | hyphal | filamentous | thalloid
schema_fields.body_size_mm: number — for sessile, mature colony extent; for motile, adult body length
schema_fields.diet: string[] — food tokens. Can include other species ids, guild tokens, or substrate/resource tokens
schema_fields.predators: string[] — species ids of known predators (computed from inverse, but allowed as explicit override)
schema_fields.life_stages: object — per-stage overrides (egg/larva/pupa/adult); each may override diet, perception_radius_cm, movement_speed_per_day_cm
schema_fields.movement_speed_per_day_cm: number — for motile, baseline daily traversal
schema_fields.citations: string[] — short-form references (full bibliography in research/)
